---
layout: default
title: "Rajya Sabha Bypolls and Legislative Developments"
date: 2026-07-10T04:31:31.130263+00:00
summary: "BJP recruits defectors for Rajya Sabha seats as Parliament passes transgender rights legislation and debates women's reservation"
run_time_ist: "10:01AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:01AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>BJP Rajya Sabha nominations:</strong> The BJP has fielded three former Trinamool Congress MPs for Rajya Sabha bypolls in West Bengal, drawing sharp criticism from the TMC leadership after the trio joined the party just hours prior.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Women&#x27;s reservation deadlock:</strong> The Lok Sabha has failed to pass the Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at providing reservation for women in the Lower House and State Assemblies, despite ongoing parliamentary discussions.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Supreme Court legal challenge:</strong> Sonam has petitioned the Supreme Court in the Raja Raghuvanshi murder case, asserting innocence and claiming to have been falsely implicated.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Transgender rights legislation:</strong> Parliament has officially passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, following its approval by the Rajya Sabha today.</li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary conduct:</strong> Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla has reiterated that the freedom of speech within the House remains strictly subject to established parliamentary rules and procedures.</li>
</ul>
